evals.name: zoro-json-full
evals.prompt: 我需要在 deli-b2b-oversea 项目里对接 ZORO 平台的库存推送接口。接口信息：POST 到 https://api.zoroapi.com/openapi/inventory/push ，Header 里要带 X-Auth-Token 用于鉴权，请求体是 JSON，字段是 skuCode（String）和 stockQty（Integer），响应是标准 JSON {code, msg, data}，code=0 表示成功。麻烦把整套 EIP 集成代码生成出来。
assertions: Service interface generated under deli-aries-eip-api with @Fun + @Function and FUN_NAMESPACE constant
EipConfig implements IEipAnnotationSingletonConfig and declares schema + host + construct() (@Function QUERY)
Constants file exposes /openapi/inventory/push as public static final String
Service impl annotated @Integrate + @Integrate.Advanced(path=Constants.XXX), method body is exactly 'return null;'
Service impl method return type is EipResult<SuperMap>
@Integrate.RequestProcessor.finalResultKey is explicitly set (prevents token bleed into body)
@Integrate.RequestProcessor.convertParams maps X-Auth-Token to HEADER position
EipConfig has no getter/setter and no Lombok
Service impl method body is only 'return null;' (no real call code)

evals.name: sinosure-xml-bidirectional
evals.prompt: 在 deli-b2b-oversea 里对接印尼中信保 CRM 的 doBprBuyerCodeApply 接口。CRM 那边暴露的是 SOAP 1.1 风格的 XML 接口，URL 是 http://crmhwtest.nbdeli.com:8070/Interface.asmx ，请求体是 XML（包含 buyerName / countryCode / applyDate 等字段），响应也是 XML（retCode / retMsg / serialNo）。请把这个 EIP 集成接口完整生成，包括 XML 序列化/反序列化处理。
assertions: XmlSerializable class exists with FUNCTION_NAME like EIP_SERIALIZABLE_<ClassName>_stringToSuperMap
XmlInOutConverter class exists with FUNCTION_NAME like EIP_IN_OUT_CONVERTER_<ClassName>_exchangeObject
Both XmlSerializable and XmlInOutConverter @Fun namespace is EipConfigurationConstant.FUNCTION_NAMESPACE
Service impl @Integrate.RequestProcessor sets finalResultKey AND inOutConverterFun + inOutConverterNamespace
Service impl @Integrate.ResponseProcessor sets serializableFun + serializableNamespace
InOutConverter.exchangeObject sets Content-Type to application/xml or text/xml
Service impl method body is 'return null;' returning EipResult<SuperMap>
EipConfig schema defaults to http (URL is http://) and host matches crmhwtest.nbdeli.com:8070
Constants file declares /Interface.asmx

evals.name: dingtalk-skeleton
evals.prompt: 我后面要做一个钉钉群机器人发消息的对接，目前就知道是 POST 调用钉钉的 webhook，请求体大概是 markdown 内容。具体路径和签名细节我之后再补。先把代码骨架搭起来。
assertions: All four skeleton files generated: Service, EipConfig, Constants, Service impl
Constants uses TODO markers for the unknown webhook path (no fabricated path)
Service impl method body is 'return null;' even in skeleton mode
Service impl carries @Integrate(config=...) + @Integrate.Advanced annotations referencing Constants
EipConfig implements IEipAnnotationSingletonConfig with construct() skeleton
CHANGES.md lists TODO fields and what the user must fill in
No getter/setter or Lombok on Config
